summary: Frontend testing of VenuLock landing page premium mobile UI refinement pass. ALL 15 CRITICAL AND STANDARD REQUIREMENTS PASS. Key verified: dropdown overlay z-100 with max-h-64, solid #B8963F gold on all 4 gold buttons (no shimmer), border-white/80 on search card, category arrows hidden lg:block, stats 32px/48px mobile/desktop, section margins mb-10 lg:mb-14, chat scroll-gated on mobile.

CRITICAL_city_dropdown_overlay.details: City dropdown opens as overlay with z-index 100, max-h-64 (256px) scrollable, 12+ options visible, not clipped by sections below

CRITICAL_mobile_cta_above_fold.details: CTA button bottom at 424.2px - well above 844px fold. 419.8px pixels to spare.

gold_buttons_solid_B8963F.details: All 4 gold buttons use solid rgb(184,150,63) = #B8963F with white text: header Get Started, hero CTA, final CTA Start Booking, mobile menu Get Started

no_shimmer_animation.details: No btn-shimmer class on any gold button. Animation property is 'none' on all.

hero_card_border.details: Search card has border-white/80 class, renders as '1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8)', with softer shadow

city_mode_no_label.details: City mode shows single dropdown + CTA only, no label text, placeholder 'Select your city'

nearme_mode_elements.details: Near Me mode shows message 'Discover venues around you.' + 'Use My Location' button + CTA

search_navigation.details: Select city (Mumbai) → click CTA → navigates to /venues/search?city=Mumbai correctly

category_arrows_hidden_mobile.details: Category ChevronRight arrows have 'hidden lg:block' class - display:none on mobile (390px), visible on desktop hover

section_heading_margins.details: How It Works, Why VenuLock, Testimonials all have mb-10 lg:mb-14 (56px on desktop)

trust_badges_gap.details: Trust badges grid has gap-5 (20px) on mobile

stats_numbers_size.details: Stats section numbers: text-[32px] (32px) on mobile, text-[48px] (48px) on desktop

all_page_sections_render.details: All 10 sections present: trust badges, categories, featured venues, how it works, why venulock, stats, cities, testimonials, final CTA, footer

mobile_hamburger_menu.details: Mobile menu toggle works, Browse Venues, List Your Venue links present, Get Started button (#B8963F) functional

chatbot_scroll_gated.details: Chat button hidden initially (opacity: 0 at scroll=0), visible after scrolling 600px (opacity: 1 at scroll=700)

test_credentials: N/A - no auth required for landing page
context_for_next_testing_agent: Premium mobile UI refinement pass complete. All shimmer removed - solid #B8963F on all gold buttons. Dropdown overlay z-100 max-h-64 works. Category arrows hidden lg:block. Stats 32px mobile / 48px desktop. Section margins mb-10 lg:mb-14. Trust badges gap-5. How It Works gap-6 mobile. Chatbot scroll-gated at 600px. Search card border-white/80.
